bead.title: build(feat-009): Cypher executor — in-memory streaming runtime
bead.description:
Implement a streaming executor for the Cypher operator tree from the planner bead, against an in-memory entity/link store. Smallest end-to-end execution path: parser → validator → planner → executor.

Each operator is a row iterator; bounded memory, ORDER BY without a covering index materializes; everything else streams. 30-second wall-clock timeout enforced.

Add crates/axon-cypher/src/memory_store.rs with a QueryStore trait against an in-memory entity+link store sufficient for testing. The trait will later be implemented over axon-storage::StorageAdapter (separate bead).

Out of scope: SQLite/Postgres backends, GraphQL surface, MCP surface, subscriptions.
bead.acceptance: AC1. crates/axon-cypher/src/executor.rs has execute(plan, store) -> RowStream. AC2. crates/axon-cypher/src/memory_store.rs implements the QueryStore trait. AC3. The DDx ready/blocked query end-to-end (parse → validate → plan → execute) returns expected ready and blocked beads on a hand-built dataset of 10 beads with 15 links. AC4. Bounded-memory streaming; only ORDER BY/collect()/DISTINCT materialize. AC5. 30-second wall-clock timeout enforced. AC6. ≥10 integration tests: DDx ready/blocked, dependency DAG (US-023), reachability (US-025), DISTINCT, OPTIONAL MATCH, EXISTS true/false, count(*), ORDER BY ASC/DESC. AC7. cargo test -p axon-cypher passes; clippy clean.
